response.justification: Bogdan brings a strong background in geospatial data platforms, distributed systems, and high-performance application development, which are highly relevant to building routing data pipelines. While his recent commercial C++ experience is limited, his work with Dlang on low-latency systems and his overall adaptability suggest he could quickly ramp up on C++ or Rust. His staff-level experience and commitment to software craftsmanship are also significant positives.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data and GIS platforms.
Proven ability to build and operate distributed, low-latency systems.
Demonstrated adaptability and willingness to learn new technologies.
concerns: Limited recent commercial experience with modern C++ or Rust.
Specific experience with "routing" or "navigation guidance" is not explicitly mentioned.
C++ experience is from an older timeframe (2014-2015).
